events.title: React & Next.js Frontend Summit
events.description: Deep dive into the latest React 19 features, Server Components, and Next.js 15 routing strategies with industry experts.

events.title: AI & Machine Learning Innovators
events.description: Exploring large language model fine-tuning, RAG architectures, and ethical AI deployment in enterprise environments.

events.title: Rust Systems Programming Meetup
events.description: Networking and technical talks focused on memory safety, async Rust, and building high-performance microservices.

events.title: Cloud Native & DevOps Days
events.description: Best practices for Kubernetes scaling, GitOps workflows, and infrastructure as code using modern Terraform modules.

events.title: Cybersecurity & Zero Trust Summit
events.description: Workshops on implementing zero-trust architecture, threat hunting, and securing cloud-native applications against modern exploits.
